product.name: ArDura 1000 C
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny PA 6.6 — warianty powlekane, FR i wzmocnione
product.familyDescriptorEn: PA 6.6 fabrics — coated, FR and reinforced variants
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
product.titleDescriptor: Pa6.6 woven fabric for military equipment
product.specLine: 300 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArDura 1000 C is heavyweight 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military equipment.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for military and police bags.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
Pa6.6 woven fabric for military equipment
300 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>3000N; Weft>2500N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>250N; Weft>200N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
Allergenic Dyestuffs | Not Detected | EN ISO 14362-1

acceptedMatches.rationale: Product explicitly and repeatedly states military equipment application, both in title, descriptions and technical parameters.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Listed as a property and cites EN ISO 20471, but no explicit statement of high-visibility safety garment use in descriptions; appears to be a generic property tag inconsistent with military fabric context.
Antibacterial property present but no explicit medical or healthcare use stated.
Category source group mentions motorcyclists as a general context for PA6.6 fabrics, but this specific product's descriptions focus on military/police use without explicit motorcycle apparel mention.
